languages.text: {n}Янур бросает долгий взгляд на капитана Дунавски. Затем они кивают друг другу.{/n} "Искупление для одного, Ваша Светлость. Мы понимаем".
{n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."
languages.original_text: {n}Янур бросает долгий взгляд на капитана Дунавски. Затем они кивают друг другу.{/n} "Искупление для одного, Ваша Светлость. Мы понимаем".

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."
{n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."
"You're a proper idealist, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But if that's your wish, to wash the dynasty's name clean with blood in the eyes of the Merov regiment... Well, I can only wish you luck."
{n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."
{n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."

languages.text: 「あなたは正真正銘の理想主義者ですね、御{mf|殿|殿}。でも、それがあなたの願いなら、メローヴ連隊の目に、王朝の名誉を血で清めるのなら… 私はただ幸運を祈るだけです」
languages.original_text: "You're a proper idealist, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But if that's your wish, to wash the dynasty's name clean with blood in the eyes of the Merov regiment... Well, I can only wish you luck."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは正真正銘の理想主義者ですね、御{mf|殿|殿}。でも、それがあなたの願いなら、メローヴ連隊の目に、王朝の名誉を血で清めるのなら… 私はただ幸運を祈るだけです。」

languages.text: {n}Janur, Dunawski'ye uzun bir bakış atıyor. Sonunda ikisi birbirlerine baş sallıyor.{/n} "Sona kalana kefaret {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Anladık."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur, Dunawski'ye uzun bir bakış atıyor. Sonunda ikisi birbirlerine baş sallıyor.{/n} "Sona kalana kefaret {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Anladık."

languages.text: {n}Janur dedica una larga mirada a Dunawski. Por fin, asienten entre ellos.{/n} «Expiación para el último, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Entendido».
languages.original_text: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur dedica una larga mirada a Dunawski. Por fin, asienten entre ellos.{/n} «Expiación para el último, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Entendido».

languages.text: {n}雅努尔久久地注视着杜纳芙斯卡。终于，两人彼此点了点头。{/n}“一人之赎，舰长大人。我们明白了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅努尔久久地注视着杜纳芙斯卡。终于，两人彼此点了点头。{/n}“一人之赎，舰长大人。我们明白了。”

languages.text: {n}Janur lance un regard appuyé à Dunawski, et les deux finissent par s'adresser un signe de tête.{/n} « Expiation pour un seul, Votre Seigneurie. Nous comprenons. »
languages.original_text: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur lance un regard appuyé à Dunawski, et les deux finissent par s'adresser un signe de tête.{/n} « Expiation pour un seul, Votre Seigneurie. Nous comprenons. »

languages.text: {n}Janur sieht Dunawski lange an. Schließlich nicken sich die beiden zu.{/n} "Sühne für den Einzelnen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Wir haben verstanden."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur gives Dunawski a long look. Finally, the two of them nod to each other.{/n} "Atonement for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We understand."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur sieht Dunawski lange an. Schließlich nicken sich die beiden zu.{/n} "Sühne für den Einzelnen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Wir haben verstanden."
